title: Flame's Accessories
body:
This mod adds a few equipable items that increase your stats. There are currently 6 equipable items and 4 basic items. 
## All the items:
- Redstone Infused Sugar
- Red Diamond
- Gilded Nether Star
- Gilded Nether Star Cluster
- Swift Ring (Equipable, +5% speed)
- Charm of the Swift (Equipable, +20% speed +50% attack speed)
- Zephyr's Stride (Equipable, +0.2 speed +3 attack speed)
- Guardian's Ward (Equipable, +1 armor toughness)
- Charm of the Defensive (Equipable, +1 armor +1 armor toughness)
- Eternal Bastion (Equipable, (Stats bugged still trying to figure out why it isn't working))

## How to Craft:
Redstone Infused Sugar (8 redstone, 1 sugar) (makes 4)

![1 sugar surrounded by 8 redstone creating 1 Redstone Infused Sugar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d97bd5e6ca9140505a41177fa2236f12793284.png)

Red Diamond (4 redstone, 1 diamond)

![1 diamond surrounded by 4 redstone creating a Red Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9608b7aa1a9bce08ea2dc55fe0d9204bcd634f09.png)

Gilded Nether Star (4 gold ingot, 1 nether star)

![1 nether star surrounded by 4 gold ingots creating a Gilded Nether Star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93b7b7c9caa8393bc8dc582610ed4f7c658633fc.png)

Gilded Nether Star Cluster (3 Gilded Nether Star) Shapeless

![3 Gilded Nether Stars making a Gilded Nether Star Cluster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5082a774c85246622d7166fc34a0afc126abd87.png)

Swift Ring (3 gold ingot, 4 Redstone Infused Sugar, 1 Red Diamond)

![4 Redstone Infused Sugar in the corners with 3 Gold ingots on the sides and the bottom, and 1 Red Diamond at the top making a Swift Ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11949f6db4596567c2dce42c6b03199fb5798c9b.png)

Charm of the Swift (4 Redstone Infused Sugar, 4 Swift Ring, 1 Gilded Nether Star)

![4 Redstone Infused Sugar in the corners with 4 Gold ingots on the all the side, and 1 Gilded Nether Star in the middle making a Charm of the Swift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21828509013b6a45631bdc31ec29ed3cf9f07f2e.png)

Zephyr's Stride (1 Charm of the Swift, 1 Gilded Nether Star Cluster) (although it has the same texture as the Charm of the Swift, it normally has an enchantment glint) Shapeless

![1 Charm of the Swift and 1 Gilded Nether Star Cluster making a Zephyr's Stride](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6425e8781460bc827cd8bf591b4ef92faec9b37.png)

Guardian's Ward (4 diamonds, 4 gold, 1 shield)

![4 diamonds in the corners and 4 gold on the sides with a shield in the middle crafting a Guardian's Ward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/438604e9a66fc708dc28ccbd3a0d1ddc6f3c79c4.png)

Charm of the Defensive (4 shields, 4 Guardian's Wards, 1 Gilded Nether Star)

![4 shields in the corners, and 4 Guardian's Ward on the sides, with a Gilded Nether Star in the center crafting a Charm of the Defensive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44bb0ea20dda6e155f8ce20b2f2b6218eef11de4.png)

Eternal Bastion (1 Charm of the Defensive, 1 Gilded Nether Star Cluster (although it has the same texture as the Charm of the Defensive, it normally has an enchantment glint)Shapeless

![1 Charm of the Defensive and 1 Gilded Nether Star Cluster making a Eternal Bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6582023f6e5ed5ddd62ee3928a2a0ea43764f0d7.png)
